purpose: Replace the staged public organization-connect form with a durable PostgreSQL-authoritative intake that records consent, enforces idempotency and anti-spam controls, emits audit/outbox evidence and returns a real request number without changing transaction, money or external-integration authority.
forbiddenCapabilities: creating an Organization, User, membership, role or tenant from the public request
sending personal data through URL parameters, analytics events, logs, audit metadata or outbox payloads
storing raw IP addresses or raw user-agent strings
client-authoritative success, fake request numbers or in-memory persistence
changing Deal, money, bank, FGIS, EDI, TAI or external-integration authority
changing packages, lockfiles, Caddy, deployment topology or production secrets
acceptance: request plus audit plus outbox commit atomically through an EXECUTE-only pre-tenant command boundary
exact idempotency replay returns the original request before new-request rate limiting and conflicting replay fails closed
database-backed per-IP and per-email rate limits use only keyed hashes and trusted-proxy-derived network identity
consent version and timestamp are persisted
public response contains only request number, status, replay flag and correlation id
RU EN ZH form submits to the server and displays the real request number
